/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Game.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/PhysicsObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/Primitives.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/Level.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/Platformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/Object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/TextureCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Game.dir/src/Light.cpp.o -o Game  libglad.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 libquark.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
